name: clone-app-skill

metadata.description: Claude Code plugins: Android reverse engineering plus clone-feasibility analysis

plugins.name: android-reverse-engineering
plugins.description: Decompile Android APK/JAR/AAR with jadx, trace call flows through libraries, and document extracted APIs.

plugins.name: clone-app
plugins.description: Analyze a Google Play app for cloning: APK reverse engineering, AI-assisted effort estimation, market viability.

plugins.name: market-research
plugins.description: Research the app/game market and surface scored, non-repeating clone candidates that feed into clone-app.

plugins.name: clone-build
plugins.description: Build a verified, prod-ready clone (app or game) from a clone-build-spec.md, driving a gated task graph.
